title: CooperCompanies to Present at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Dec. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a leading global medical device company, will participate at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, January 9, 2024. Al White, President and CEO, will represent the Company in a session scheduled to begin at 6:00 PM ET.

title: CooperCompanies Sets Annual Meeting And Stockholder Record Dates
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Dec. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Cooper Companies (Nasdaq: COO) announced today that it will hold its next annual meeting of stockholders on Tuesday, March 19, 2024. Stockholders of record as of the close of business on January 24, 2024, will be eligible to vote on matters presented in the Company's proxy statement, including electing its slate of directors.

title: Cooper Companies (COO) Q4 Earnings In Line, '23 Outlook Raised
text: Cooper Companies' (COO) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 revenues reflect a solid segmental performance with improved adjusted earnings amid moderating expenses.

title: COO Stock Earnings: Cooper Companies Misses EPS, Beats Revenue for Q4 2023
text: Cooper Companies (NYSE: COO ) just reported results for the fourth quarter of 2023. Cooper Companies reported earnings per share of $3.47.

title: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Cooper Companies, Inc. title: CooperCompanies Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Dec. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a leading global medical device company, today announced financial results for its fiscal fourth quarter and full year ended October 31, 2023.
